description: Navigate to the Wikipedia page for Apollo 11 (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Apollo_11). 1) Bookmark the main article in a NEW bookmark folder named 'Space History'. 2) Use Wikipedia's native sidebar tool ('Download as PDF') to generate and download a PDF version of the article. 3) Use Wikipedia's native 'Cite this page' tool to download the BibTeX formatted citation for the article. 4) Locate both downloaded files and move/rename them EXACTLY to: ~/Documents/Research/apollo11.pdf and ~/Documents/Research/apollo11.bib.
